evidence_hint: The injector engine doesn't dogfood its own metadata: src/*.ts carry only plain // purpose comments (e.g. pipeline.ts:1) and none contain the injector's own `>>> l9:meta >>>` block or L9_META header. grep -l matches only comment.ts/verify.ts which merely define the sentinels.
residual_if_not_resolved: Run the injector over its own src/ as a CI step (or commit stamped headers), turning self-injection into a behavior test.
